title: arif_init (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `arif_init`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing arifos schema for `arif_init` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: init must know who is speaking AND what symbolic world the session operates inside.

symbolic_context.description: §3.A — Session must know the symbolic world it operates inside.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every arif_init output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
